requirement_topic.en: SSNBS Standards Capacity and Market-Access Framing
requirement_topic.zh: SSNBS标准能力与市场准入定位
requirement_topic.zht: SSNBS標準能力與市場准入定位

summary.en: South Sudan is the world's newest country and its formal standards, testing, market-surveillance, and EV infrastructure capacity remains nascent. South Sudan National Bureau of Standards (SSNBS) is the national standards body reference, but a mature EVSE-specific public conformity route should not be assumed. EV charger imports and installations are likely to be handled through project procurement, customs/import review, donor or development-finance specifications, utility or site-owner approval, and practical electrical-installation acceptance. Exporters should frame South Sudan as an early, project-led market rather than a mature EVSE certification market.
summary.zh: 南苏丹是世界上最新的国家，其正式标准、测试、市场监管和电动汽车基础设施能力仍处于初期。南苏丹国家标准局（SSNBS）是国家标准机构参考方，但不应假定存在成熟的EVSE专项公开合格评定路径。充电桩进口和安装很可能通过项目采购、海关/进口审查、援助或开发融资规范、公用事业或场站业主批准，以及实际电气安装验收来处理。出口商应将南苏丹定位为早期、项目主导市场，而不是成熟EVSE认证市场。
summary.zht: 南蘇丹是世界上最新的國家，其正式標準、測試、市場監管和電動汽車基礎設施能力仍處於初期。南蘇丹國家標準局（SSNBS）是國家標準機構參考方，但不應假定存在成熟的EVSE專項公開合格評定路徑。充電樁進口和安裝很可能通過項目採購、海關/進口審查、援助或開發融資規範、公用事業或場站業主批准，以及實際電氣安裝驗收來處理。出口商應將南蘇丹定位為早期、項目主導市場，而不是成熟EVSE認證市場。

standards_or_laws: South Sudan National Bureau of Standards (SSNBS) standards and conformity-assessment role
South Sudan customs/import and project procurement requirements where applicable
Donor, development-finance, utility, or fleet-owner technical specifications
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 as expected international technical references

summary.en: China's EV charger documentation is normally built around GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930 DC communication, China domestic grid acceptance, and China CCC or other domestic conformity steps where applicable. These records may support supplier due diligence but do not establish South Sudan market access, SSNBS acceptance, donor-procurement compliance, SSEC acceptance, or site electrical approval.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩文件通常围绕GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930直流通信、中国国内电网验收，以及适用时的中国CCC或其他国内合格评定步骤建立。这些记录可支持供应商尽调，但不能证明南苏丹市场准入、SSNBS接受、援助项目采购合规、SSEC接受或场站电气批准。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁文件通常圍繞GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930直流通訊、中國國內電網驗收，以及適用時的中國CCC或其他國內合格評定步驟建立。這些記錄可支持供應商盡調，但不能證明南蘇丹市場准入、SSNBS接受、援助項目採購合規、SSEC接受或場站電氣批准。

gap.en: Exporters should identify the importer of record, customs route, site owner, SSEC or mini-grid interface, donor or lender specification, vehicle fleet connector mix, service plan, spare-parts plan, and IEC evidence package before claiming South Sudan readiness. Because the EV market is essentially non-existent or extremely early, sales claims should avoid implying a mature public charging network or settled national connector mandate.
gap.zh: 出口商在宣称适用于南苏丹前，应明确登记进口商、海关路径、场站业主、SSEC或微网接口、援助方或贷款方规范、车辆车队接口组合、服务计划、备件计划和IEC证据包。由于电动汽车市场基本不存在或极其早期，销售表述应避免暗示存在成熟公共充电网络或已定型的全国接口强制要求。
gap.zht: 出口商在宣稱適用於南蘇丹前，應明確登記進口商、海關路徑、場站業主、SSEC或微網接口、援助方或貸款方規範、車輛車隊接口組合、服務計劃、備件計劃和IEC證據包。由於電動汽車市場基本不存在或極其早期，銷售表述應避免暗示存在成熟公共充電網絡或已定型的全國接口強制要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional and project-led — SSNBS EVSE-specific mandatory scope is unconfirmed; donor, customs, utility, site-owner, and procurement requirements may become mandatory for the specific shipment or installation
mandatory_status.cn: China CCC or GB/T evidence may be mandatory domestically but is not a South Sudan market-access substitute

source.publisher: South Sudan National Bureau of Standards (SSNBS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South Sudan should be treated as a nascent, project-led EV charger market. Confirm SSNBS, customs, SSEC or site-owner, donor, and procurement requirements for the specific shipment and site before quoting China GB/T hardware as ready.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南苏丹应被视为早期、项目主导的电动汽车充电桩市场。在将中国GB/T硬件报价为可用前，应针对具体出货和场站确认SSNBS、海关、SSEC或场站业主、援助方和采购要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南蘇丹應被視為早期、項目主導的電動汽車充電樁市場。在將中國GB/T硬件報價為可用前，應針對具體出貨和場站確認SSNBS、海關、SSEC或場站業主、援助方和採購要求。
